text:

Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii

Yet another new version 1.7.8 is released.

Please commit attached patch instead of previous ones.

Regards.

----Next_Part(Thu_Aug__7_14_07_35_2008_017)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: inline; filename=patch-xpi-noscript

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr1/freebsd/cvsroot/ports/www/xpi-noscript/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.42
diff -u -r1.42 Makefile
--- Makefile	14 May 2008 04:49:32 -0000	1.42
+++ Makefile	7 Aug 2008 05:01:33 -0000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	noscript
-PORTVERSION=	1.6.5
+PORTVERSION=	1.7.8
 DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	-fx+mz+sm
 CATEGORIES=	www
